negative_prompt: The video captures a series of frames showing ugly scenes, static with no motion, motion blur, over-saturation, shaky footage, low resolution, grainy texture, pixelated images, poorly lit areas, underexposed and overexposed scenes, poor color balance, washed out colors, choppy sequences, jerky movements, low frame rate, artifacting, color banding, unnatural transitions, outdated special effects, fake elements, unconvincing visuals, poorly edited content, jump cuts, visual noise, and flickering. Overall, the video is of poor quality.
name: human_181
prompt: A dynamic video captures three surfers running towards the ocean on a sunny day. The man in the middle, clad in a red wetsuit, carries a white surfboard with a blue leash, while the other two surfers, both in black wetsuits, hold their boards. The beach is wet from the receding waves, and the ocean stretches out under a clear blue sky. As the surfers approach the water, the man in the red wetsuit dives into the shallow waves, creating splashes around him. The camera follows their movement, capturing them from behind in a fluid transition from the sandy shore to the frothy ocean as they prepare to enter the water. By the final frames, only the man in the red wetsuit and the woman on his left remain visible, emphasizing their readiness to surf.
